name: Cover page (sealed deliverable opening)
notes: The first impression. Composed-from variants: cover-with-photo / cover-typography-only / cover-with-key-stat. Aspect ratio 16:9 for slides; A4 portrait for PDF dossiers.

name: Executive summary block
notes: 3-7 sentence summary. Variants: hook-first / conclusion-first / evidence-first. The TLDR for executives who will not read further.

name: Context anchor (why this why now)
notes: 1-2 sentence anchor that grounds the recipient in the why-now. Variants: shared-acquaintance-anchor / shared-event-anchor / shared-research-anchor / market-trigger-anchor.

name: Hook (engagement opener)
notes: 1-sentence hook. Variants: question-hook / contrarian-claim-hook / data-point-hook / story-fragment-hook.

name: Greeting (mail / DM open)
notes: Variants: formal-named (Dear X) / warm-named (Hi X) / informal-firstname (X) / regional-localised (Estimado X / Cher X). Locale-aware per channel.

name: Body (main content block)
notes: The expandable middle. Variants: 3-bullet-body / 1-paragraph-body / sectioned-body-with-subheads / numbered-list-body.

name: Call-to-action (next step)
notes: The Shadcn-shape exemplar. Composed-from: cta-prose-only / cta-link-styled / cta-button-primary / cta-button-secondary / cta-stack-primary-plus-secondary / cta-cal-com-embedded. Variants per channel: mail-cta-button / dm-cta-link / slide-cta-prose / web-cta-button. Variants per audience: J-IN-cta-deeper-conversation / J-CU-cta-discovery-call / J-AD-cta-retainer / J-ENISA-cta-evidence-review.

name: Signature block
notes: Closing identity block. Variants: minimal-name-only / full-with-title / full-with-logo / full-with-confidentiality-notice / locale-localised.

name: Evidence block (sources / citations)
notes: Cited evidence with confidence and source-class metadata. Per source_taxonomy.md + confidence_levels.md. Variants: footnoted / inline-cited / appendix-only.

name: Methodology note (how-we-arrived-at)
notes: Per RESEARCH_HEAD_DISCIPLINE.md applied-research discipline. Names which methodology was applied to derive a finding. Variants: brief-paragraph / table-of-methods / deep-appendix.

name: Slide hero (single-message slide)
notes: Single bold slide with 1 message. Variants: huge-quote-slide / huge-stat-slide / huge-image-slide / split-text-image.

name: Slide compare (before-after / vs / option-matrix)
notes: Two-or-more-column compare. Variants: 2-col-before-after / 3-col-options / N-row-feature-matrix.

name: Slide progress (timeline / phase / milestone)
notes: Linear or branching progress visual. Variants: horizontal-timeline / vertical-roadmap / gantt-style / milestone-dots.

name: Slide appendix (deep-dive support)
notes: Higher density than hero. Variants: methodology-detail / sources / glossary / FAQ.

name: Mermaid flowchart
notes: Per akos-planning-traceability.mdc plan-quality-bar mermaid section. Variants: phase-dependency / decision-tree / system-architecture / sub-component-architecture.

name: Mermaid gantt
notes: Per akos-planning-traceability.mdc gantt section. Variants: initiative-gantt / engagement-roadmap-gantt / quarterly-gantt.

name: Data table (sortable / scannable)
notes: Variants: simple-3-col / dense-with-filter / nested-with-row-expand / sticky-header-and-first-col.

name: Form field (input element)
notes: Per Radix UI + React Hook Form composition. Variants: text-input / select / multi-select / checkbox-group / radio-group / textarea / date-picker / file-upload.

name: Dashboard card (information block)
notes: Variants: stat-card / list-card / chart-card / action-card / status-card.

name: Navbar (top navigation)
notes: Variants: minimal-2-link / full-with-search / sticky-on-scroll / mobile-hamburger.

name: Sidebar (lateral navigation)
notes: Variants: collapsible-w-icons / always-expanded / two-level-grouped / mobile-drawer.

name: Empty state (no-data view)
notes: Per impeccable skill empty-states recommendation. Variants: first-time-onboarding / no-results-after-filter / error-with-retry / permanent-not-applicable.

name: Loading state (in-flight UI)
notes: Variants: skeleton-page-shell / skeleton-card-shell / spinner-overlay / progress-bar-determinate.

name: Error state (failure UI)
notes: Variants: inline-form-error / page-level-error / toast-error / error-with-retry-CTA.

name: Confidentiality block (legal-NDA-classification)
notes: Per access_levels.md AL1-AL5 + INTELLECTUAL_KIND_REGISTRY.csv sharing-label. Variants: AL1-public / AL3-counterparty-NDA / AL4-internal-only / AL5-operator-only.
